description: A Conventional Commits message, decomposed into its parts.

scope.description: Optional module/area scope. Empty string if no scope applies.

subject.description: Imperative-mood summary, under 60 chars, no trailing period.

body.description: Why-not-what explanation, wrapped at 72 cols. Empty string if the diff is self-explanatory.

breaking_change.description: Description of any public-API break. Empty string if non-breaking.

affected_paths.description: Top-level files or directories touched by the change.
